planner-agent.description: Task planner -- decomposes high-level prompts into structured, assignable subtasks

frontend-dev.description: Frontend development specialist -- React, TypeScript, CSS, UI/UX

backend-dev.description: Backend development specialist -- APIs, databases, server-side logic

database-specialist.description: Database specialist -- schema design, migrations, query optimization

test-writer.description: Test specialist -- unit, integration, and e2e test writer

devops-agent.description: DevOps pipeline architect -- CI/CD, Docker, K8s, GitHub Actions

security-reviewer.description: Security review agent -- OWASP Top 10, auth, injection, secrets exposure

quality-reviewer.description: Code quality review agent -- smells, maintainability, test coverage

architecture-reviewer.description: Architecture review agent -- separation of concerns, dependencies, scalability

qa-evaluator.description: QA Evaluator -- functional testing via Playwright MCP, catches 'compiles but doesn't work' bugs

master-reviewer.description: Master reviewer -- aggregates scores, calculates confidence, creates follow-up tasks
